mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_ppe_equipment WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_equipment WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_ppe_equipment WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_ppe_equipment WHERE category = #{category} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_equipment WHERE category = #{category} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_ppe_equipment WHERE (name LIKE '%' + #{name} + '%' OR model LIKE '%' + #{name} + '%') AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_equipment WHERE (name LIKE '%' + #{name} + '%' OR model LIKE '%' + #{name} + '%') AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM tb_ppe_equipment WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_equipment WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_equipment WHERE equipment_id LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_equipment WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_equipment WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0
SELECT AVG(wear_rate) as avgWearRate FROM tb_ppe_equipment WHERE deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ppe_equipment SET stock_quantity = CASE WHEN stock_quantity + #{delta} < 0 THEN 0 ELSE stock_quantity + #{delta} END, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_ppe_equipment ( equipment_id, name, name_en, name_zh, category, category_en, category_zh, model, certification, stock_quantity, min_stock, max_stock, wear_rate, expiry_date, inspect_cycle, last_inspect_date, next_inspect_date, storage_location, department, status, notes, is_consumable, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{equipmentId}, #{name}, #{nameEn}, #{nameZh}, #{category}, #{categoryEn}, #{categoryZh}, #{model}, #{certification}, #{stockQuantity}, #{minStock}, #{maxStock}, #{wearRate}, #{expiryDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{inspectCycle}, #{lastInspectDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{nextInspectDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{storageLocation}, #{department}, #{status}, #{notes}, #{isConsumable,jdbcType=BIT}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ppe_equipment SET name = #{name}, name_en = #{nameEn}, name_zh = #{nameZh}, category = #{category}, category_en = #{categoryEn}, category_zh = #{categoryZh}, model = #{model}, certification = #{certification}, stock_quantity = #{stockQuantity}, min_stock = #{minStock}, max_stock = #{maxStock}, wear_rate = #{wearRate}, expiry_date = #{expiryDate,jdbcType=DATE}, inspect_cycle = #{inspectCycle}, last_inspect_date = #{lastInspectDate,jdbcType=DATE}, next_inspect_date = #{nextInspectDate,jdbcType=DATE}, storage_location = #{storageLocation}, department = #{department}, status = #{status}, notes = #{notes}, is_consumable = #{isConsumable,jdbcType=BIT}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_ppe_equipment SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
